records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What did you want to see me for?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wieso wollten Sie mich sehen?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eh bien, que me vaut le plaisir ?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fu, You want to go another round with me? Of course, I'll be the winner in the end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, ein Wettkampf ist mir immer willkommen. Nat9588rlich werde ich wieder gewinnen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait. Come to think of it, something's weird.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Moment. Jetzt, wo ich so dar9588ber nachdenke, ist es merkw9588rdig.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why do you keep challenging me even though you know you can't win?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Pourquoi continues 95p jouer avec moi, quand tu sais que tu vas perdre ?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's your angle, huh?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wer sind Sie und was f9588hren Sie im Schilde?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've made it all the way here by gambling with my life. Do you really think I'm going to fall for that?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But now that I think of it... I knew something was up. Why else would you bother with someone like me...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, answer me. Why did you approach me in the first place?

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right then. Let's play.
